titleStmt.title: SII 23.61: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 61. (A.R. No. 61 of 1907.) Kaṭṭamañchi, Chittoor Taluk, Chittoor District On a rock in a garden known as Navābu-tōpu Parāntaka I: year 31: 937-38 A.D.

summary.p: This is dated in the 31st year of Madiraikoṇḍa Parakēsarivarman (Parāntaka I) and registers the sale of some land under the tank free of all taxes, and also of another plot irrigated by means of water lift in the village Kīḻai-Kaṭṭamachchi in Tūynāḍu, to a resident of the village by the ūrār (assembly) of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastī śrī . matiraikoṇṭa koparakecaripaṉmaṟki yāṇṭu muppat
toṉṟāvatu tūynāṭṭuk kiḻaikkaṭṭamacci Ūro mivvūr veṇ
ṇā kaṇṭaṉār makaṉ paṟipperumāṉukku Oṭṭi viṟṟuk
kuṭutta paricāvatu Ettattālum Erikiḻppaṭṭiyopātiyālum moṭ ṭiṉa
paricāvatu maṇavāṭṭic cūṭu Ettattāṟ patiṉaintūmpu nellukkum
Erikiḻkaḷil paṭṭiopātiyāṟ patiṉaintūmpu nellukkuc cūṭuṅ kā
rpicāṉam muṭṭuvatākavum mivvūr nālopāti maṉṟāṭṭum Ivaṉukku Āca
ntrakālamum mivaṉukku mivaṉ makkaḷvaḻi Āṇṭuṇpatākavum
parihārammākak kuṭuttom mitaṟṟirampiṟ ṟiruvāṇai va
lintār paṭun taṇṭap paṭuvo
māṉom mittaṇ
ṭappaṭṭum mikka
ṉmel lekhit
taparice Ūṭṭuvomā
ṉoṅ kiḻaikkaṭṭamacci Ūrom
Ūrār colla Eḻutiṉeṉ ṉi
vvūr śivabrāhmaṇaṉ vināya
kaṉeṉ ..
Digital edition of SII 23.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
